docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - NOT SIGNED SERVED NOV-04-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND, KATHRYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASMUSSEN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND, KATHRYN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASMUSSEN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHMOND, KATHRYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.13 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,220.13, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF 2603.67 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RASMUSSEN, JENNIFER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,052.92 FILED BY RASMUSSEN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND, KATHRYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
